definition: The ICC profile header contains multiple 4-byte FOURCC fields (device-class at 0x0c, colorspace at 0x10-0x16) that must jointly resolve to a specific class/colorspace combination; I2S substitutes the exact logged FOURCC constants into those offsets while VP's CMP_MAP gradient preserves intermediate near-match header inputs as corpus, both techniques being jointly necessary because the multi-field configuration cannot be reached by gradient alone nor by single-shot substitution of one field.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer for FOURCC class-tag comparisons and splices the exact 'spac'/'prtr' constants at input offset 0x0c, reaching the XYZ->Lab conversion arm that value_profile's Hamming gradient cannot assemble.
signature.one_line: I2S splices exact device-class FOURCC 'spac'/'prtr' to reach XYZ-to-Lab arm

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile with XYZ-data PCS device-class (spac/prtr) input plus Lab output PCS, driving the XYZ->Lab conversion arm

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 4-byte device-class / profile-class signature at offset 0x0c that the parser maps to XYZ-data PCS (winner seeds carry 'spac'=73 70 61 63 or 'prtr'=70 72 74 72), combined with the Lab output PCS selection, so InPCS==cmsSigXYZData and OutPCS==cmsSigLabData reach line 443.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds set offset 0x0c-0x0f to 'spac'/'prtr' (W bytes 70(p)/73(s) at 0x0c) and additionally flip the discriminator bytes at 0x2d (W=01) and 0x3d (W=50 'P'), which the loser never produces; these literal four-byte FOURCC class tags are exactly what I2SRandReplace can splice from a logged CMP operand.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds are stuck at offset 0x0c='mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) for all 20 occurrences and keep 0x2d=00, 0x3d=00, so the parser routes to a PCS path that never enters the XYZ->Lab arm at line 443.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer where the parser compared the input class tag against the literal 'spac'/'prtr' FOURCC constants and substitutes that constant into the input bytes; value_profile has no I2SRandReplace and cannot place the exact multi-byte tag, so value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile on the I2S axis.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the XYZ->Lab conversion arm, requiring XYZ input PCS and Lab output PCS.
The blocked side is the true branch of the line-443 InsertStage check.
Winner seeds carry 'spac' or 'prtr' class tags at offset 0x0c while losers are stuck on 'mntr'.
Winner seeds set discriminator byte 0x3d to 'P' while losers keep it zero.
Winner seeds set byte 0x2d to 01 while losers keep it 00.
value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile on the I2S axis with prob_div 0.90.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
I2SRandReplace scans the input for byte sequences matching one operand and substitutes the other operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog on the value_profile axis with prob_div 0.70.
cmplog resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1 on this branch.
value_profile's CMP_MAP preserves inputs whose operand pair is closer to matching than any previously-seen pair.

An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with avg hitcount 19 on the branch.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the XYZ->Lab arm on a 4-byte literal class tag at a fixed offset where cmplog/vpc fail to resolve at higher rate than value_profile, showing I2S substitution does not place the tag.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact semantic role of bytes 0x2d and 0x3d (W=01, W='P') is inferred as PCS/class discriminators from the byte diff but not confirmed against the lcms profile-header parse path.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient gives distance credit for each colorspace/PCS sub-field comparison that approaches the XYZ-input/Lab-output discriminant, letting vpc_cmplog accumulate partial-match stepping-stones across multiple header fields that bare cmplog discards.
signature.one_line: VP gradient accumulates multi-field colorspace partial matches toward XYZ-Lab arm

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile with XYZ-data PCS device-class (spac/prtr) input plus Lab output PCS, driving the XYZ->Lab conversion arm

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same XYZ-PCS-in / Lab-PCS-out structural requirement, but reached via incremental gradient progress on the multi-field colorspace comparison rather than a single substitution; the input must simultaneously satisfy the class tag and the colorspace fields (0x10-0x16) selecting Lab output.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with hitcount 19 on the branch, getting CMP_MAP gradient credit for each colorspace/PCS sub-field that moves closer to the XYZ->Lab discriminant, layered on top of I2S substitution.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog (no value profile) resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1, so without the Hamming/prefix-distance feedback it rarely accumulates the multi-field colorspace state needed to enter the XYZ->Lab arm.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient preserves intermediate inputs that get closer on the colorspace/PCS comparisons, giving the fuzzer a smooth path to the XYZ->Lab discriminant; cmplog lacks this distance feedback, so value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog on the value_profile axis.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs the device-class FOURCC literals compared in the dispatch and substitutes 'spac'/'prtr' at offset 0x0c, routing the profile into the devicelink/abstract branch where AddConversion is called; value_profile's Hamming gradient cannot complete the exact 4-byte tag.
signature.one_line: I2S plants exact device-class FOURCC to reach AddConversion call site

analysis.summary_one_line: Reach AddConversion via the devicelink/named-color path by setting the profile device-class signature at 0x0c (spac/prtr, not mntr) plus colorspace bytes.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte device-class signature at offset 0x0c must equal a 4CC such as 'spac' or 'prtr' (and the colorspace fields at 0x10-0x16 must form a profile whose ColorSpaceIn is compatible with CurrentColorSpace) so the loop routes into the devicelink/abstract branch (line 576) and reaches the AddConversion call at line 592 with a non-NULL Lut.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry 'spac' (73 70 61 63) or 'prtr' (70 72 74 72) at offset 0x0c-0x0f and resolve the true branch with hitcount 19, taking the True side of line 592 (W T=12).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds all carry 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at offset 0x0c-0x0f, never take the True side of line 592 (L T=0 F=38), and stay blocked with hitcount 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile: the CMP interception logs the literal 4CC operands compared against the input (device-class / colorspace tag matches) and substitutes them at the matching input offsets, planting the exact 'spac'/'prtr' magic that value_profile's Hamming-bucket gradient alone never completes; the winning seed's lineage shows an I2S-floor dash row confirming an I2S find in the ancestor chain.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the True side of the AddConversion call at cmscnvrt.c:592 inside DefaultICCintents.
Line 592 is reached only via the devicelink/named-color branch gated at line 576.

Loser-blocking seeds contain the 'mntr' device-class signature in their bytes.
The winner takes the True side of the blocker while the loser never does.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact device-class 4CC value driving AddConversion is inferred from byte-diff concentration; whether 'spac'/'prtr' specifically (vs any non-'mntr' class that sets lIsDeviceLink/named-color) is the literal CMP operand I2S substitutes is not directly confirmed in source.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient preserves inputs that get closer on the colorspace-compatibility comparisons as new corpus entries, compounding I2S substitution in vpc with a stepwise ratchet toward the compatible-colorspace configuration that bare cmplog's edge-bucket feedback cannot climb.
signature.one_line: VP gradient compounds I2S by retaining near-miss colorspace-compatibility inputs

analysis.summary_one_line: Reach AddConversion via the devicelink/named-color path by setting the profile device-class signature at 0x0c (spac/prtr, not mntr) plus colorspace bytes.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same device-class/colorspace byte configuration (device-class 4CC at 0x0c != 'mntr', compatible colorspace at 0x10-0x16) that routes into the devicelink branch and satisfies the ColorSpaceIsCompatible check at line 568, reaching AddConversion at line 592.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with hitcount 19; its seeds reach the True side of the blocker (line 592 W T=12) after passing the colorspace-compatibility chain.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked 8/10 with avg hitcount 1, far below the winner, indicating its plain I2S substitution rarely assembles the full compatible-colorspace configuration the branch requires.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient over cmplog: each CMP-operand pair closer to matching adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus, giving a stepwise gradient toward the colorspace-compatibility comparisons that bare cmplog (edge-bucket feedback only) cannot climb, so vpc compounds I2S substitution with gradient retention to reach the branch reliably.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes intercepted FOURCC/colorspace constants (device-class and colorspace tags at header offsets) into the input, constructing the output-direction profile combination that causes conversion failure with a non-NULL Lut; plain value_profile cannot assemble this multi-field header.
signature.one_line: I2S assembles rare output-direction device-class/colorspace header combination

analysis.summary_one_line: Profile bytes that force an output-direction PCS conversion whose ComputeConversion/AddConversion fails, reaching Error with Lut still allocated.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Profile-header bytes (device class FOURCC at offset 0x0c and color-space signatures at 0x10/0x14) that select a non-input, non-devicelink profile so the output-direction branch (line 602) runs _cmsReadOutputLUT and a subsequent ComputeConversion/AddConversion failure jumps to Error while Lut is non-NULL.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry varied device-class FOURCCs (link/prtr/spac) and color spaces (MCHC/GRAY/RGB/MCH1/Lab) at the header offsets, and per-role coverage shows the winner exclusively hitting the output-direction block (lines 562-566, 602-612) and the abstract/conversion path (583-592).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds are uniformly 'mntr'+'RGB ' headers that take the input direction (line 597 lIsInput true), so Lut is freed at line 619 before any goto and the Error path never sees a non-NULL Lut.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes intercepted CMP operands (the FOURCC/colorspace literals compared inside cmsGetDeviceClass/ColorSpaceIsCompatible) into the input bytes, letting vpc construct the rare device-class/colorspace combination that drives the output-direction conversion failure; plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side is the Error-path free of a non-NULL Lut.
The winner exclusively exercises the output-direction conversion block.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The Pair-2 value_profile attribution rests on the cmplog-vs-vpc hitcount/resolution gap plus mechanism reasoning, not on a direct lineage trace showing CMP_MAP stepping-stones for the cmplog loser.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's Hamming/prefix-distance CMP_MAP buckets preserve inputs approaching the colorspace/device-class comparison matches as corpus, supplying stepping-stones to I2S substitution in vpc; cmplog alone discards near-misses and cannot ratchet toward the rare header combination.
signature.one_line: VP CMP_MAP retains near-miss colorspace header inputs as I2S stepping-stones

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same output-direction-failure profile, but here reached via gradient progress on the integer/string CMPs guarding the colorspace-compatibility and conversion checks rather than purely by substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with avg hitcount 80 on the branch; its CMP_MAP gradient feedback preserves intermediate inputs that get progressively closer to matching the colorspace signature CMPs (lines 568, 583), so the output-direction conversion path is reached and fails into Error.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: plain cmplog resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 8; without CMP_MAP-bucket feedback it cannot retain near-miss inputs on the colorspace comparisons, so it rarely assembles the exact header combination that drives the output-direction failure.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (Hamming-distance / matching-prefix buckets) preserves inputs that approach matching the colorspace/device-class comparisons as new corpus entries, supplying cmplog's substitution stage in vpc with stepping-stones; cmplog alone has only edge-bucket feedback and cannot ratchet toward the rare combination.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs tag-type and device-class signature comparands and splices them into multiple header fields (device-class 'link' at 0x0c, colorspace bytes, flag 0x01 at 0x2d), making _cmsGetTagTrueType return a non-Lut16 type that crosses the OriginalType != cmsSigLut16Type guard.
signature.one_line: I2S plants non-Lut16 tag-type and device-class signatures to cross type equality guard

analysis.summary_one_line: A devicelink profile whose readable tag's on-disk true type is NOT cmsSigLut16Type ('mft2'), so OriginalType != Lut16 holds.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A profile that parses far enough to read a tag back (device class 'link'/'abst', valid acsp magic, a non-Lut16 LUT tag) so that _cmsGetTagTrueType returns a tag type signature OTHER than cmsSigLut16Type. This requires several 4-byte signature fields (device class at 0x0c, colorspace fields at 0x10-0x17, and the tag-true-type discriminator) to hold specific structural values rather than the still-blocked 'mntr'/Lut16 layout.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 trials and reaches the true side (avg hitcount 14, blocked only 6.5h). Its winning seeds carry device-class bytes 'link' (offset 0x0c-0x0f) and varied colorspace signatures, and offset 0x2d flips to 01 vs the loser's 00 — distinct multi-byte signature substitutions consistent with I2SRandReplace splicing a logged tag-type/signature operand into the input at the offsets the parser compares.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile resolves 0/10, stays blocked all 24h with hitcount 0 on the branch. Its blocking seeds keep device class 'mntr' (offset 0x0c-0x0f) and offset 0x2d=00, so the tag read either fails or yields a Lut16 (mft2) true type, leaving OriginalType == cmsSigLut16Type and the true branch unreached.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile. I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer, finds the input bytes matching one operand of an intercepted signature/type comparison, and substitutes the other operand, planting the exact 4-byte signature(s) the parser needs to make _cmsGetTagTrueType return a non-Lut16 type. value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient cannot place an exact multi-byte signature, so it never crosses.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker's true side is taken only when the read tag's true type is not Lut16, and that side is globally blocked.
OriginalType is the on-disk true type of the read tag, so the feature is a profile whose tag true type differs from Lut16.
value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile decisively at this branch (the I2S delta pair).
The winner resolves 9/10 with hitcount 14 while the value_profile loser stays blocked 10/10 with hitcount 0.

winner: resolved=9/10  blocked=1  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry device class 'link' at the start of the profile while loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
Offset 0x2d is concentrated at 01 in winners but 00 in all losers, a clean dataflow signal.
Winning seeds contain the ASCII 'link' device-class signature.
Loser-blocking seeds contain the 'mntr' device-class signature instead.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes one CMP operand at the input offsets matching the other operand.

picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot place an exact multi-byte signature.
value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog decisively at this branch (the value_profile delta pair).
cmplog resolves only 2/10 vs the winner's 9/10 at this branch.
value_profile's CMP_MAP preserves any input whose operand pair is closer to matching than previously seen, giving incremental progress.

An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on `OriginalType != cmsSigLut16Type` where value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates (no I2S advantage) AND cmplog matches value_profile_cmplog (no CMP_MAP advantage), showing the multi-byte signature gate is crossable by havoc alone.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact program-side role of offset 0x2d (01 vs 00) is inferred from the byte-diff concentration, not from a confirmed source field mapping to the tag-type discriminator.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient buckets preserve inputs whose multi-byte signature fields (device class, colorspace, tag type) are progressively closer to a valid non-Lut16 layout, building the corpus scaffold that the I2S stage in vpc then completes; cmplog alone discards these near-miss seeds.
signature.one_line: VP gradient retains near-miss signature seeds that cmplog discards as corpus scaffold

analysis.summary_one_line: A devicelink profile whose readable tag's on-disk true type is NOT cmsSigLut16Type ('mft2'), so OriginalType != Lut16 holds.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same non-Lut16-true-type profile structure, but reached via incremental Hamming/prefix-distance progress on the chain of signature/equality comparisons (device class, colorspace, tag type) so that intermediate near-matches are retained as corpus and refined toward the exact non-Lut16 layout.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 vs cmplog's 2/10 (prob_div 0.70, hit_div 8); its CMP_MAP feedback preserves seeds whose 4-byte signature fields (0x0c-0x12) are progressively closer to a valid non-Lut16 tag layout, building the corpus that the I2S stage then completes.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked ~20h with branch hitcount 6 — it has I2S but lacks the CMP_MAP gradient, so near-miss signature seeds that don't change an edge bucket are discarded and the search loses the partial-progress scaffold value_profile_cmplog keeps.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient over cmplog. Each signature/type CMP writes a (PC, distance-bucket) entry; an input whose operand pair is closer to matching than any seen adds a new bucket and is preserved as corpus. This retains the intermediate near-match profiles that cmplog throws away, giving the combined fuzzer a refinable foothold on the multi-field signature gate.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker's true side is taken only when the read tag's true type is not Lut16, and that side is globally blocked.
OriginalType is the on-disk true type of the read tag, so the feature is a profile whose tag true type differs from Lut16.
value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile decisively at this branch (the I2S delta pair).
The winner resolves 9/10 with hitcount 14 while the value_profile loser stays blocked 10/10 with hitcount 0.

winner: resolved=9/10  blocked=1  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry device class 'link' at the start of the profile while loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
Offset 0x2d is concentrated at 01 in winners but 00 in all losers, a clean dataflow signal.
Winning seeds contain the ASCII 'link' device-class signature.
Loser-blocking seeds contain the 'mntr' device-class signature instead.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes one CMP operand at the input offsets matching the other operand.

picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot place an exact multi-byte signature.
value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog decisively at this branch (the value_profile delta pair).
cmplog resolves only 2/10 vs the winner's 9/10 at this branch.
value_profile's CMP_MAP preserves any input whose operand pair is closer to matching than previously seen, giving incremental progress.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on `OriginalType != cmsSigLut16Type` where value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates (no I2S advantage) AND cmplog matches value_profile_cmplog (no CMP_MAP advantage), showing the multi-byte signature gate is crossable by havoc alone.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact program-side role of offset 0x2d (01 vs 00) is inferred from the byte-diff concentration, not from a confirmed source field mapping to the tag-type discriminator.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes ICC magic/signature operands into the right header offsets, clearing upstream equality gates that gate construction of an offset-bearing matrix stage; VP cannot place those operands and the Offset pointer stays NULL.
signature.one_line: I2S clears header equality gates enabling non-NULL matrix stage Offset construction

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile parsed into a matrix stage carrying a non-NULL Offset vector, so MatrixElemDup duplicates the offset row.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Bytes that survive ICC header signature/colour-space checks and place a non-zero offset payload so the matrix stage's Data->Offset pointer is non-NULL; W seeds carry the 'lams'/'link' profile class and non-zero bytes at offsets 0x2d (01) and 0x38 (16) where the loser holds zero.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog seeds reach the true side: avg hitcount on branch winner=29, loser=0, and the byte diff shows winner-only 01 at 0x2d and 16 at 0x38 (loser is 00 at both), the dataflow that yields a populated Offset.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile never resolves (resolved=0/10, blocked=10); its seeds hold 00 at 0x2d and 0x38 and the 'lcms'/'mntr' header bytes, so the matrix stage is built without an Offset and the true branch is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the per-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the matching ICC magic/signature operands into the input at the right offsets, letting value_profile_cmplog clear the header CMPs that gate construction of an offset-bearing matrix stage; value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and cannot place those operands.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of `if (Data ->Offset)` in MatrixElemDup, taken only when the matrix stage carries a non-NULL Offset.
On the true side the winner-only lines duplicate the offset vector.
Winner-resolving seeds carry non-zero bytes at offsets 0x2d and 0x38 where the loser-blocking seeds are all zero.
Winner-only byte at offset 0x38 is 16 versus loser 00.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The link from the non-zero bytes at 0x2d/0x38 to the runtime population of Data->Offset is inferred from the byte diff, not traced through the ICC matrix-stage parser source.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per comparison and retains any input that brings a comparand pair closer to matching; this gradient on the ICC header/signature bytes drives vpc past the multi-field signature gates that cmplog's edge-bucket-only feedback cannot incrementally solve.

hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog blocks 8/10 and stays at hitcount 13 with avg blocked duration 20.20h; without CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance feedback it has no gradient to preserve near-miss inputs and rarely assembles the offset payload.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per CMP and preserves any input that gets a comparand pair closer to matching; this gradient feedback, present only in value_profile_cmplog within this pair, drives the winner past the header gates that cmplog (edge-bucket only) cannot incrementally solve.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged CMP operands for the profile-class FOURCC check into the matching input offsets, producing a non-empty pipeline whose stages cmsPipelineCat attempts to dup, reaching the InsertStage true branch; VP without I2S never substitutes the alternate profile-class operands.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes profile-class FOURCC enabling non-empty pipeline stage-dup insertion path

analysis.summary_one_line: A multi-profile ICC input whose profile-class/colorspace FOURCC fields build a non-empty Lut pipeline that cmsPipelineCat dups stage-by-stage.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A valid 4-byte ICC profile-class FOURCC at offset 0x0c (e.g. 'link','prtr','spac','lcms') plus a recognized device/colorspace tag, so DefaultICCintents builds a non-empty Lut whose stages cmsPipelineCat then dups into l1 via cmsPipelineInsertStage.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry varied non-default profile-class signatures at 0x0c-0x0f ('lcms','link','prtr','spac','MCH1'), and the vpc winner's lineage contains an I2S-floor dash row that splices logged CMP operands into these FOURCC offsets, producing inputs that traverse the stage-dup loop and take the blocked true side.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace; its loser-blocking seeds are uniformly 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f (6d 6e 74 72) and never substitute the alternate profile-class operands needed, so the pipeline stays in a shape that does not reach the InsertStage true branch (0/10 resolved).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the logged comparand for the profile-class FOURCC check at the input offset, which value_profile (no I2S stage) cannot perform.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of an InsertStage check inside the per-stage dup loop of cmsPipelineCat.
The winner takes the loop/insert path while the blocked true side is the global blocker.

Loser-blocking seeds are uniformly 'mntr' at the profile-class offset.
Winner-resolving seeds carry alternate profile-class signatures such as 'link' and 'spac'.

hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: plain cmplog has no CMP_MAP feedback; without per-bucket distance credit it cannot accumulate the partial FOURCC/colorspace progress and resolves only 2/10 trials (loser blocked=8).

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged FOURCC operands ('prtr' device-class, 'Lab ' colorspace) into the matching input signature offsets, steering execution to a cmsPipelineAlloc call where InputChannels reaches cmsMAXCHANNELS and the boundary check fires.
signature.one_line: I2S places 'prtr'/'Lab' FOURCCs to route to cmsMAXCHANNELS boundary check

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile whose class/colorspace FOURCC signatures route to a cmsPipelineAlloc call with InputChannels >= cmsMAXCHANNELS

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Exact 4-byte FOURCC profile-class and colorspace tokens at offsets 0x0c-0x16 (e.g. 'prtr', 'Lab ') that must equal hard-coded signature constants the parser compares against, steering execution to a cmsPipelineAlloc invocation whose InputChannels argument reaches cmsMAXCHANNELS so line 1373's true side is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning vpc seed carries 'prtr' at 0x0c-0x0f and 'Lab Lab ' at 0x10-0x17, and is the only seed that takes the true side (L1373 T=1 in the W role); its lineage contains an I2S-floor dash row, so I2SRandReplace spliced a logged CMP operand into these signature offsets.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; its blocking seeds keep the generic 'mntr'/'RGB '/'XYZ ' signatures at those offsets and never flip line 1373 to true (L1373 T=0 F=492 in the L role).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact signature constant at the matching input offset, instantly satisfying the multi-byte FOURCC equality that value_profile (which lacks the mutator) cannot place by chance.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the InputChannels>=cmsMAXCHANNELS comparison in cmsPipelineAlloc, globally blocked on its true side.

vpc wins both decisive pairs, one isolating value_profile and one isolating I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only roadblock is the multi-byte FOURCC signature equality, where cmplog alone (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves the branch as fast as vpc — that would show I2S substitution suffices and the value_profile axis is not required, collapsing the multi_feature claim.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The CMP_MAP-gradient axis (Pair 1) is inferred from the loser's 24h block and the winner's concentrated FOURCC bytes rather than from a direct prefix-distance observation, so the value_profile contribution is the least directly evidenced claim.
